hero.title: Better Chemistry – With Customers _and_ Science
hero.subtitle: At KBG Technologies, we believe the right chemistry can make all the difference between good and great results. As a full-service water treatment and chemical solutions provider, we combine advanced science with personalized service to help businesses across Memphis, West Tennessee, North Mississippi, and Eastern Arkansas operate at their best.

features.title: Legionella control and prevention
features.description: Services focused on controlling and preventing Legionella in systems.

secondarySection.title: Customized Solutions
secondarySection.description: KBG Technologies offers custom water treatment programs tailored to fit your industrial and commercial needs, ensuring compliance with safety standards.
